headline: What Kept Coming Up When Analysts Grilled DAL
summary: Delta's record results look great on paper, but analysts on its latest call kept testing one big question about whether the good times can actually last.

raw.headline: What Kept Coming Up When Analysts Grilled DAL

headline: Frontier Airlines to add Starlink internet on planes starting 2027
summary: Investing.com -- Frontier Airlines Inc. announced Tuesday it will install SpaceX's Starlink on its aircraft by early 2027, joining a growing number of carriers choosing Elon Musk's company for inflight Wi-Fi service.

raw.headline: Frontier Airlines to add Starlink internet on planes starting 2027

headline: Southwest Airlines: What 2Q26 (And Oil Crisis) Could Bring
summary: Southwest Airlines (LUV) Hold call with $44 target: cost progress, fee strategy, but fuel volatility/no hedging risks EPS.
